internal.content:
---
title: Adding new rules
---

OOTB rules are stored in the `packages/config/rules` folder.

See the [css-rules-tool guide](../overview) for details on the ordering of the rules.

MdxNode.rawBody:
---
title: Adding new rules
---

OOTB rules are stored in the `packages/config/rules` folder.

See the [css-rules-tool guide](../overview) for details on the ordering of the rules.
